summary: Phase 1 pre-production testing complete. All 12 backend notification tests pass (qa_phase1_notifications.py), all 12 blind spot tests pass (qa_blind_spots.py). Frontend redirect flow verified: /register route alias works, redirect param propagates between SignUp↔SignIn, OAuth localStorage storage works, login redirects to target URL. Scheduler intervals verified: declarative_deadline_job=5min, dispute_escalation_job=15min. Auto-linkage function tested and working.
critical_code_review_comments: notify_dispute_escalated() and notify_decision_rendered() correctly use _resolve_target_contact() helper to handle both with-account and without-account targets
Email idempotency implemented via was_email_sent() check before sending, using 'no_account_{email}' as idempotency key for users without accounts
_auto_link_user_to_participants() correctly links both participants AND disputes when user logs in with matching email
Scheduler intervals correctly set: declarative_deadline_job=5min (line 260), dispute_escalation_job=15min (line 269)
OAuthButtons.js correctly stores redirect in localStorage before OAuth redirect (line 12-14 for Google, line 26-28 for Microsoft)
AuthCallback.js correctly reads localStorage nlyt_auth_redirect and navigates to it after OAuth success (lines 42-44, 60-62)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (5/5 tests: register route, redirect propagation, OAuth buttons, localStorage, login redirect)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data and temporary test data cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 pre-production features fully tested. All notification flows (escalation, decision) work for both with-account and without-account targets. Auto-linkage function links orphan participants AND disputes on login. Scheduler intervals reduced as specified. Frontend redirect flow works end-to-end.
